prompt: 我 CLAUDE.md 里有一段 commit message 规范大概 200 行了，占了半个文件，读着累。想抽成 skill。规则摘要：格式 type(scope): summary，type 有 feat/fix/chore/docs/refactor/test/perf/style/build/ci，必须说清楚'为什么'不只是'改了什么'，中文项目用中文，首行 ≤72 字符，body 可选但建议带动机，breaking change 要 footer 标注，co-author 用官方格式。还有几十条 examples。抽成 skill 吧。

assertions.description: Produces a SKILL.md with valid YAML frontmatter (at least name + description)
Long examples are split into reference/ (not packed into SKILL.md main body) — matches the progressive disclosure principle
Description is intent-forward and includes realistic trigger phrasing
Process notes or frontmatter explicitly address disable-model-invocation — commit messages are side-effecting, worth considering manual-only invocation
Process notes address whether this content belongs in a skill vs staying in CLAUDE.md — a skill suits action playbooks, not facts/conventions
Main SKILL.md has a pointer telling Claude when to consult reference/examples.md (not just a bare 'see examples')
